Calculator.title: Passive Profit Calculator
Calculator.goldGrowthTooltip: This figure is based on the historical Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of gold over the past decades. Please note that past performance is not a guarantee of future results; gold prices may fluctuate based on global market conditions.
Calculator.tierUgyfelDesc: Steady 2% monthly growth, capping at 72% of the invested capital after 36 months.
Calculator.tierVasarloiDesc: The same 2% curve, but with a spectacular 'jump' at month 36 (+36% bonus), reaching 108%. This is the 'reward' moment.
Calculator.tierPremiumDesc: The 4% monthly discount tallies here, reaching 144% by month 36, after which the 200% fee-refund phase begins.

TrustSignals.title: Reliability and Security Above All
TrustSignals.goodDelivery: LBMA Good Delivery certified gold bars
TrustSignals.goodDeliveryTooltip: The highest standard of quality, purity, and reliability set by the London Bullion Market Association, guaranteeing global acceptance.
TrustSignals.vaultsTooltip: Directly and ethically sourced gold from Ghana's most reliable mines, ensuring complete traceability of origin.
TrustSignals.auditTooltip: All transactions and inventory are regularly verified by independent international auditing firms to ensure 100% transparency.

discount.title: The Discount Model
discount.description:
Our customers receive a monthly discount on the gold price, with a 2% or 4% monthly discount refund over 36+36 months. 4 types of purchase options:

1. Purchase of physical gold: You buy the selected gold, which is delivered to you. In this case, there is no extra profit.
2. 36-month deferred delivery (2%): With a 36-month delivery delay, you receive a 2% monthly refund on the gold price. Can be canceled at any time, the refund is kept, and at the end, delivery or buyback can be requested.
3. Delivery discount (3%): You receive 2% of the amount paid at purchase monthly in EUR for 3 years. Upon maturity, an additional 36% discount is given (totaling 3% per month), and then TGI AG delivers the gold.
4. Premium service (4%): You purchase the gold with a premium package, and TGI AG pays 4% of the amount paid monthly in gold and EUR. After 3 years, you also get the premium price back doubled, or the entire inventory can be sold back to the company.
